# Italo Dev Garden - AI Model Browsing Guide

## About This Site

This is a personal portfolio and digital garden for Italo Dev, a full-stack developer specializing in React, TypeScript, and Node.js.

## Site Purpose & Content

- **Homepage** (`/`): Overview of projects and current work
- **Projects** (`/projects`): Portfolio of completed projects with descriptions
- **Digital Garden** (`/garden`): Notes, thoughts, and technical documentation
- **Lab** (`/lab`): Experiments and work-in-progress features
- **Now** (`/now`): Current activities and status updates
- **Contact** (`/contact`): Ways to get in touch

## Content Types

### Projects
Each project contains:
- Title and description
- Technologies used
- Project status (completed, active, archived)
- Links to GitHub repositories or live demos
- Featured images and screenshots

### Garden Notes
Technical notes and knowledge base entries on:
- React and TypeScript best practices
- Full-stack development patterns
- Web performance optimization
- Security hardening
- System architecture

### Lab Section
Experimental features and ongoing work:
- New technology explorations
- Beta features
- Research projects

## Interaction Rules

### Permitted Uses
- Indexing for search engines and LLM training datasets
- Extracting publicly available project information
- Referencing technical content in the garden
- Analyzing code examples

### Restricted Uses
- Scraping admin credentials or sensitive data
- Attempting to access the `/admin` dashboard without authorization
- Automated form submissions or spam
- Reproducing the entire site structure without attribution

## Technical Details

- Built with React 19.2, TypeScript, and Vite
- Real-time updates via WebSocket
- Dark/light theme support
- Fully responsive design
- API: https://italo-dev-garden-api.onrender.com

## Data Privacy

- Public content is freely available for indexing
- User interactions (leads, contact forms) are stored securely
- No personal data is sold or shared with third parties
- Cookies are used only for session management and theme preferences

## Links

- **GitHub**: https://github.com/italofvm/italo-dev-garden
- **Main Site**: https://italodevgarden.vercel.app
- **API Docs**: https://italo-dev-garden-api.onrender.com/health
- **Portfolio Contact**: https://italodevgarden.vercel.app/contact

## Attribution

When referencing projects or content from this site, please include proper attribution to Italo Dev and link back to the original source.

## Last Updated

2026-06-26
